name: WB005P HE-Frag (Full Charge)
description:
The 130mm family of separately loaded, case charge munitions are issued to the Type 1959 130mm cannon, domestically produced variants of the Soviet 130mm towed field gun M1954 (M-46, GRAU Index 52-P-482). The HE-Frag projectile is issued with either a full variable or a reduced variable charge. The APHE projectile is fired with the full charge as issued. 
The full variable charge is supplied with various charge bags of 双芳-3 23/1 tubular grains, totaling 12.9kg. This provides two velocity zones. The reduced variable charge is supplied with a 0.7 kg bundle of 7/1 propellant, and multiple bags of 9/7 loose grains totaling 5.82 kg. This provides three further velocity zones.
This case represents when firing the charge as issued. Nominal velocity is 930m/s. Nominal pressure is 3150 kgf/cm^2 in copper crusher gauge. Computational values of 3370 and 3465 kgf/cm^2 are attested in the source.
For simplicity, bundled charge has been treated as the equivalent mass in loose grains, with reasonable accuracy.
Reference:
 《火炮内弹道计算手册》(1987)
 《火炸药手册 (增订本）第二分册》(1981).
 《炮弹火箭弹手册：第二分册 陆军炮弹与火箭弹》(1984)

name: WB005P HE-Frag (No.1 Charge)
description:
The 130mm family of separately loaded, case charge munitions are issued to the Type 1959 130mm cannon, domestically produced variants of the Soviet 130mm towed field gun M1954 (M-46, GRAU Index 52-P-482). The HE-Frag projectile is issued with either a full variable or a reduced variable charge. The APHE projectile is fired with the full charge as issued. 
The full variable charge is supplied with various charge bags of 双芳-3 23/1 tubular grains, totaling 12.9kg. This provides two velocity zones. The reduced variable charge is supplied with a 0.7 kg bundle of 7/1 propellant, and multiple bags of 9/7 loose grains totaling 5.82 kg. This provides three further velocity zones.
This case represents firing the full variable charge with a supplementary charge bag of 1.9kg taken out. Nominal velocity is 810m/s. This entry adopts the same properties of charge from the full charge entry, with a reduction in charge mass. 
For simplicity, bundled charge has been treated as the equivalent mass in loose grains, with reasonable accuracy.
Reference:
 《火炮内弹道计算手册》(1987)
 《火炸药手册 (增订本）第二分册》(1981).
 《炮弹火箭弹手册：第二分册 陆军炮弹与火箭弹》(1984)

name: WB005P HE-Frag (No.2 Charge)
description:
The 130mm family of separately loaded, case charge munitions are issued to the Type 1959 130mm cannon, domestically produced variants of the Soviet 130mm towed field gun M1954 (M-46, GRAU Index 52-P-482). The HE-Frag projectile is issued with either a full variable or a reduced variable charge. The APHE projectile is fired with the full charge as issued. 
The full variable charge is supplied with various charge bags of 双芳-3 23/1 tubular grains, totaling 12.9kg. This provides two velocity zones. The reduced variable charge is supplied with a 0.7 kg bundle of 7/1 propellant, and multiple bags of 9/7 loose grains totaling 5.82 kg. This provides three further velocity zones.
This case represents firing the reduced variable charge as issued. Nominal velocity is 705m/s. Nominal pressure is <=2700 kgf/cm^2 in copper crusher gauge. A computational value of 2365 kgf/cm^2 is adopted.
For simplicity, bundled charge has been treated as the equivalent mass in loose grains, with reasonable accuracy.
Reference:
 《火炮内弹道计算手册》(1987)
 《火炸药手册 (增订本）第二分册》(1981).
 《炮弹火箭弹手册：第二分册 陆军炮弹与火箭弹》(1984)

name: WB005P HE-Frag (No.3 Charge)
description:
The 130mm family of separately loaded, case charge munitions are issued to the Type 1959 130mm cannon, domestically produced variants of the Soviet 130mm towed field gun M1954 (M-46, GRAU Index 52-P-482). The HE-Frag projectile is issued with either a full variable or a reduced variable charge. The APHE projectile is fired with the full charge as issued. 
The full variable charge is supplied with various charge bags of 双芳-3 23/1 tubular grains, totaling 12.9kg. This provides two velocity zones. The reduced variable charge is supplied with a 0.7 kg bundle of 7/1 propellant, and multiple bags of 9/7 loose grains totaling 5.82 kg. This provides three further velocity zones.
This case represents firing with one balanced increments removed, Nominal velocity is 620 m/s. Characteristics of charge from the No.2 entry has been used with a reduction in charge mass.
For simplicity, bundled charge has been treated as the equivalent mass in loose grains, with reasonable accuracy.
Reference:
 《火炮内弹道计算手册》(1987)
 《火炸药手册 (增订本）第二分册》(1981).
 《炮弹火箭弹手册：第二分册 陆军炮弹与火箭弹》(1984)

name: WB005P HE-Frag (No.4 Charge)
description:
The 130mm family of separately loaded, case charge munitions are issued to the Type 1959 130mm cannon, domestically produced variants of the Soviet 130mm towed field gun M1954 (M-46, GRAU Index 52-P-482). The HE-Frag projectile is issued with either a full variable or a reduced variable charge. The APHE projectile is fired with the full charge as issued. 
The full variable charge is supplied with various charge bags of 双芳-3 23/1 tubular grains, totaling 12.9kg. This provides two velocity zones. The reduced variable charge is supplied with a 0.7 kg bundle of 7/1 propellant, and multiple bags of 9/7 loose grains totaling 5.82 kg. This provides three further velocity zones.
This case represents firing the reduced variable charge with two balanced increments removed. Nominal velocity is 525m/s. Nominal pressure is >=1100 kgf/cm^2 in copper crusher gauge. This entry adopts the same properties of charge from the No.2 charge entry, with a reduction in charge mass.
For simplicity, bundled charge has been treated as the equivalent mass in loose grains, with reasonable accuracy.
Reference:
 《火炮内弹道计算手册》(1987)
 《火炸药手册 (增订本）第二分册》(1981).
 《炮弹火箭弹手册：第二分册 陆军炮弹与火箭弹》(1984)
